questionText: Specify which agricultural or forest management practices with climate change mitigation and/or adaptation benefits you encourage your suppliers to undertake and describe your role in the implementation of each practice.
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp: This question gathers information on which management practice with climate change benefits you encourage your suppliers to undertake and your role on the implementation. This demonstrates to data users that your organization is acting on either preventing, reducing, controlling, and/or adapting to the effects of climate change in its supply chain. By encouraging your suppliers to adopt such management practices on their land, you promote awareness of sustainable production practices and ultimately contribute to reducing climate-related risks in your supply chain.

options: Change in the topography or landscapes
Governmental or institutional policies and programs
Practices to increase wood production and forest productivity
Pest, disease and weed management practices
Replacing fossil fuels by renewable energy sources
Restoration of degraded lands and cultivated organic soils
Selecting species to maximize carbon capture
optionsKo: Governmental 또는 institutional 정책 및 programs
Practices increase wood production 및 산림 productivity
Pest, disease 및 weed 관리 practices
Replacing fossil 연료 기준 renewable 에너지 sources
Restoration 의 degraded lands 및 cultivated organic soils

columns.popup_help: Please note, "None" cannot be selected alongside any other option.
columns.popup_helpKo: Please 아니요te, "아니요ne" can아니요t 선택됨 alongside 하나 이상 기타 선택지.

columns.text: Explanation of how you encourage implementation
columns.textKo: Explanation 의 how 귀사 encourage implementation

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to 7.68.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항 only appears 만약 귀사 선택 "예" response 7.68.

guidance.text:
General 
If your organization encourages your suppliers to undertake many actions, prioritize the disclosure of those that have had/are expected to have the greatest benefit to your suppliers (e.g. reducing CO 2 e emissions, saving costs, increasing productivity).
Management practice reference number (column 1) 
Select an identifier for each of management practice. This reference number shall be used to track progress on your specific project in the following years.
You may report up to 20 management practices.
Management practice (column 2) 
Select the option that best describes the action or management practice your organization encourages its suppliers to adopt. See Appendix A for details on each management practice listed.
If none of the options are applicable to your organization, select ‘Other, please specify' and indicate the management practice you encourage suppliers to adopt.
Description of management practice (column 3) 
Provide a brief company-specific description of the action or management practice, including the methods and tools used to implement it.
Provide an explanation as to why you have chosen this practice and how you expect this to mitigate climate change effects and/or improve your business resilience.
Specify the percentage of total suppliers that you encourage to adopt this action or management practice and explain any exclusions if you do not cover your entire supply chain.
Your role in the implementation (column 4) 
Select the option that best describes your role in the implementation of the action or management practice. Select all options that apply.
Consider the following definitions:
- Financial -you provide financial support to your suppliers 
- Knowledge sharing - you support knowledge sharing of agricultural/forestry management practices amongst your suppliers 
- Operational -you have operational control over the production activities that fall outside of your organizational boundary 
- Procurement -you encourage specific agricultural/forestry management practices through requirements in your procurement relationships
If none of the options are applicable to your organization, select ‘Other, please specify' and indicate your organization's role in implementing these practices.
Explanation of how you encourage implementation (column 5) 
Explain how you have encouraged your suppliers to adopt the action or management practice selected in column 2, by including details of your role in the implementation indicated in column 4 and providing company-specific examples.
Climate change related benefit (column 6) 
Select the climate change mitigation/adaptation benefits that your suppliers have/expect to receive from the implementation of this action or management practice. Select all options that apply.
If none of the options are applicable to your organization, select ‘Other, please specify' and indicate the appropriate climate change related benefit.
Comment (column 7) (optional) 
You may use this field to specify and provide a description of the methods and tools used to evaluate the climate change benefits associated with the management practices and any further details.

See Appendix 세부 정보 each 관리 practice listed. 만약 아니요ne 의 선택지 applicable 귀사, 선택 ‘기타, 직접 입력' 및 indicate 관리 practice 귀사 encourage 공급업체 adopt. Description 의 관리 practice (열 3) 제공 brief comp하나 이상-specific description 의 action 또는 관리 practice, 포함 methods 및 tools used implement it. 제공 explanation why 귀사 have chosen 이 practice 및 how 귀사 expect 이 완화 기후변화 effects 및/또는 improve 귀사의 사업 회복탄력성. Specify percentage 의 total 공급업체 귀사 encourage adopt 이 action 또는 관리 practice 및 설명 하나 이상 exclusions 만약 귀사 do 아니요t cover 귀사의 entire 공급망. 귀사의 role implementation (열 4) 선택 선택지 best 설명s 귀사의 role implementation 의 action 또는 관리 practice. 선택 모든 선택지 apply. Consider 다음 definitions: - 재무 -귀사 제공 재무 support 귀사의 공급업체 - K아니요wledge sharing - 귀사 support k아니요wledge sharing 의 agricultural/산림ry 관리 practices amongst 귀사의 공급업체 - Operational -귀사 have operational control over production 활동 f모든 outside 의 귀사al boundary - Procurement -귀사 encourage specific agricultural/산림ry 관리 practices through requirements 귀사의 procurement relationships 만약 아니요ne 의 선택지 applicable 귀사, 선택 ‘기타, 직접 입력'및 indicate 귀사의 role implementing 이 practices. Explanation 의 how 귀사 encourage implementation (열 5) 설명 how 귀사 have encouraged 귀사의 공급업체 adopt action 또는 관리 practice 열에서 선택 2, 기준 포함 세부 정보 의 귀사의 role implementation indicated 열 4 및 providing comp하나 이상-specific examples. 기후변화 related benefit (열 6) 선택 기후변화 완화/적응 benefits 귀사의 공급업체 have/expect receive 에서 implementation 의 이 action 또는 관리 practice. 선택 모든 선택지 apply. 만약 아니요ne 의 선택지 applicable 귀사, 선택 ‘기타, 직접 입력' 및 indicate appropriate 기후변화 related benefit. 의견 (열 7) (선택지al) 귀사 할 수 있습니다 use 이 field specify 및 제공 description 의 methods 및 tools used 평가 기후변화 benefits associated 관리 practices 및 하나 이상 further 세부 정보.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 per 완료 행 proportion 숫자 입력 의 행 공시된. Parti모든y 완료 행 아니요t receive full 점. 이 문항에서 최대 6/6점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
Any option excluding either 'None' OR 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Your role in the implementation' AND Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Climate change related benefit'.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this question.
